# selectedIndexes()

**Instance Method**

The selected indexes of the camera files.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func selectedIndexes() -> IndexSet!
```

## Return Value

The indexes of the selected files.

## Selection Management

- **select(_:byExtendingSelection:)**: Invoked to select the specified files, extending the selection if specified.
